courses.title: Immunization Delivery Certificate Program
courses.description: Comprehensive training to become a certified pharmacist immunizer. Covers vaccines, administration techniques, patient counseling, and emergency protocols.

courses.title: Diabetes Care Certificate Program
courses.description: Evidence-based diabetes care training covering Type 1, Type 2, medications, monitoring, and patient education strategies.

courses.title: HIV Prevention Certificate Program
courses.description: Training on HIV prevention, PrEP/PEP counseling, testing, and pharmacist-initiated services.

courses.title: Travel Health Certificate Program
courses.description: Prepares pharmacists to provide travel health services including vaccines, prophylaxis, and destination-specific counseling.

courses.title: Medication Therapy Management Certificate
courses.description: Train to deliver comprehensive medication reviews and MTM services in community and ambulatory care settings.

courses.title: Naloxone Education and Opioid Overdose Prevention
courses.description: Essential training on opioid overdose recognition and naloxone dispensing, counseling, and harm reduction strategies.

courses.title: Motivational Interviewing in Pharmacy Practice
courses.description: Learn evidence-based motivational interviewing techniques to improve patient adherence and health outcomes.

courses.title: Pharmacy Law Update: Federal and State Overview
courses.description: Comprehensive update on federal and state pharmacy laws, DEA regulations, HIPAA, and emerging legal issues in pharmacy practice.

courses.title: Medication Error Prevention and Patient Safety
courses.description: Strategies for identifying, preventing, and reporting medication errors to improve patient safety outcomes.

courses.title: Pain Management and Opioid Risk Mitigation
courses.description: Evidence-based pain management strategies, opioid prescribing guidelines, PDMP use, and risk mitigation strategies.

courses.title: Cardiovascular Disease Management
courses.description: Management of hypertension, hyperlipidemia, heart failure, and anticoagulation in pharmacy practice.

courses.title: Mental Health and Psychiatric Pharmacotherapy
courses.description: Pharmacotherapy for depression, anxiety, schizophrenia, and bipolar disorder with focus on clinical decision-making.

courses.title: Infectious Disease and Antimicrobial Stewardship
courses.description: Common infectious diseases, antibiotic selection, resistance patterns, and stewardship principles.

courses.title: NAPLEX Review and Exam Preparation
courses.description: Comprehensive NAPLEX review covering all core competency areas with practice questions and rationale.

courses.title: Geriatric Pharmacotherapy and Polypharmacy
courses.description: Safe prescribing for elderly patients, Beers Criteria, deprescribing, and managing polypharmacy.
